title: Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions!
